title: carex lasiocarpa subsp. lanuginosa
intro: Carex lasiocarpa subsp. lanuginosa, also known as woolly tussock sedge, is a type of sedge plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Carex lasiocarpa subsp. lanuginosa include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. Carex lasiocarpa subsp. lanuginosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
